title: Evade! A simple Dodge Mod
description: A mod that simply gives the player the ability to dodge with I-frames, or invunerability frames!
body:
Evade! is a mod based on Dark Souls, it allows the character to dodge attacks one of two ways. The first way is with the keybind "R." When R is pressed, the player dashes in the direction they're moving, gaining the resistance 255 buff for 0.25 seconds, but with a cooldown of 0.5 seconds. The second way is to just simply jump! Jumping gives the resistance buff for 0.13 seconds, but technically has no cooldown!

**Recommended Mods:**

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-combat-by-daedelus - Better Combat

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simply-swords - Simply Swords

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shield-expansion/files - Shield Expansion 

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-armor-and-weapons - Epic Knights

**Plans for future updates?**

- Making the i-frames depend on your stage of armour (I.E., the more armour points your character has on, the heavier they'll be, and thus will get less i-frames)

- fixing the Ice Speed glitch (currently, the movement system goes something like this "v*3", thus leading to problems when there's a lack of friction. V = any direction in the X & or Z coordinate)

- Making it so you're unable to attack during a roll

**NOTE**

THIS MOD CURRENTLY ONLY WORKS IN SURVIVAL MODE DUE TO HOW THE CODE OPERATES. I DON'T KNOW HOW TO CODE, THIS WAS MADE WITH BLOCKS BECAUSE THAT'S ALL MY MONKEY BRAIN CAN DO. 

**Lastly**

If you have any suggestions, feel free to DM me on discord. My username is renaryugu.
